regional_cost_note: Painters in Dunedin typically charge $42–$65/hr for qualified tradespeople, with apprentices around $28–$38/hr. Day rates run $360–$600. Dunedin rates sit roughly 10–20% below Auckland and Wellington.

businesses.name: Kelly Painting & Decorating Ltd
businesses.known_for: Family business painting for over 50 years, Master Painters NZ member, covering residential and commercial interior, exterior, and roof painting across Dunedin and Otago.

businesses.name: Decorating Services Ltd
businesses.known_for: 30+ years in operation with a team of 16, specialising in commercial and residential painting, wallpaper hanging, intumescent fireproof coatings, and acoustic wall coverings.
